# Kansas City Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Filing bankruptcy in Kansas City? Free 2026 guide with MO and KS exemptions, Chapter 7 vs 13, costs, and data from 91,000+ local cases.

## About
kansascitybankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Your 341 Meeting in Kansas City: What to Expect: https://kansascitybankruptcy.org/341-meeting.html
